name: Settle and Battle: New Empires
short_description: A homage to classic real-time strategy games. Gather resources, build an empire, and command powerful armies to conquer the world. Lead six unique tribes, expand your territory, and engage in epic battles with hundreds of units on screen. Dominate in 18 missions and procedurally generated maps!
detailed_description:
Settle and Battle: New Empires is a homage to classic real-time strategy games. Gather raw resources, build a thriving empire and command powerful armies. Your ultimate goal: defeat your opponents and conquer the world. Play with up to 8 players

Gameplay 💎

  • Lead Seven Unique Tribes: Command one of six distinct tribes, each with their own challenging campaign, distinctive buildings and special units

  • Conquer and Unlock: Defeat your enemies to unlock powerful abilities and expand your empire's potential.

  • Maps and Missions: Test your skills in 18 thrilling missions, or dive into procedurally generated maps for limitless replayability and own challenges.

  • Multiplayer: Play with up to 8 players. Face off against your mates or ally with them to take on the AI.

Economy ⚒️

  • Expand Your Territory: Claim rich lands and expand your empire to secure a steady flow of resources.

  • Build a Thriving Kingdom: Strategically manage resources and optimize complex production chains to ensure prosperity.

  • Boost Your Economy: Produce optional goods to increase your settlers productivity and drive economic growth.

Combat ⚔️

  • Recruit a Mighty Army: Raise a diverse force of soldiers, each with unique strengths and weaknesses.

  • Engage in Epic Battles: Command massive armies and outmaneuver your opponents in large-scale conflicts.

  • Destroy and Conquer: Lay siege to enemy cities, raze their defenses, and claim their territory as your own.

  • Battlefield: Engage in large-scale conflicts with hundreds of units on the screen

English*, German
